_comment: CrateDigger configuration. Copy to ~/.cratedigger/config.json (user) or .cratedigger/config.json (library root). Only include settings you want to override — defaults are built in.

tool_paths._comment: Set these if the tools are not in your PATH. Use null for auto-detect.

fanart._comment: fanart.tv settings. Project key is built in. Add your personal key for faster cache updates (get one at https://fanart.tv/get-an-api-key/).

content_type_rules._comment: Glob patterns to force classification. Paths relative to library root.
